description: On node 20.19.4 the corepack pnpm shim (/home/micah/.local/bin/pnpm, /usr/share/nodejs/corepack) throws ERR_VM_DYNAMIC_IMPORT_CALLBACK_MISSING and cannot install.
resolution: Use ~/.npm-global/bin/pnpm (v10.32.1) full path for all pnpm install/test/typecheck. Network install works fine via this binary.

description: Importing openseadragon (v5.0.1) references document at module top-level (openseadragon.js:995) → ReferenceError in node vitest. Any package importing @render/mount transitively fails to load tests without a DOM env.
resolution: Set vitest environment:'happy-dom' for @render/mount (packages/render-mount/vitest.config.ts). We do NOT construct a real OSD viewer headlessly — the behavioral oracle is the pure dispatchFitBounds gate (gate.test.ts); real-render is human-verified (per memory lightpanda-browser-verify-hangs).

description: Clicking Rect/Polygon + dragging on the OSD canvas produces no note. Wiring present (Canvas drawing/tool props -> setDrawingEnabled/setDrawingTool; createAnnotation -> onCreate -> session.createNote). Browser-only bug.
resolution: UNRESOLVED — fix next session. Suspects (priority): (1) Annotorious tool names 'rectangle'/'polygon' may not match plugin-tools registration — check anvil's setDrawingTool + DrawingTool type; (2) setDrawingEnabled not taking effect / mountPlugin ordering; (3) createAnnotation event not firing or onCreate not wired; (4) degenerate-guard (unlikely). Debug in browser console at :5173.

description: Canvas.svelte draw broken: $effect(() => surface?.setDrawingEnabled(drawing)) — surface is undefined on the first effect run (async onMount), so surface?. short-circuits BEFORE reading drawing, so the effect never tracks drawing and never re-runs on tool-click. Symptom: clicking Rect logged nothing; only mount-time explicit calls logged. Same for setDrawingTool/setAnnotations/select effects.
resolution: Read the reactive prop into a local FIRST, then guard: $effect(() => { const d = drawing; if (surface) surface.setDrawingEnabled(d); }). Forces dep subscription regardless of surface. RULE: in Svelte 5 $effects, read reactive deps before any guard/optional-chain that can short-circuit. Fixed all 4 Canvas effects (annotations/tool/drawing/selected). Builds clean; user to verify draw.

content: Svelte LSP false positives in this monorepo: the language server flags (a) cross-package .svelte imports as 'cannot find module', (b) onclick/onsubmit/oninput as unknown HTMLProps, (c) inline 'as' TS casts in template event handlers as 'Unexpected token [-1]'. ALL are false — vite build / astro build (the real gate) compile fine. Trust the build, not inline diagnostics. To sidestep (c), use bind:value instead of value+oninput-with-cast.

name: run-ts-core-from-node-via-vite-node
description: Running the workspace TS core (@render/core) from a node-style script: use vite-node (pnpm add -D vite-node). It resolves workspace deps + transpiles TS exactly as the app's Vite does (.js->.ts ESM + workspace:*). Used by apps/viewer/scripts/gen-published.mts (publishLibrary->disk). Unblocks the previously-deferred 'no tsx, cant run core from node' issue. NOTE: pnpm predev/prebuild lifecycle fires via 'pnpm run dev|build', NOT 'pnpm exec astro dev'.
